name: GREENLIGHT CAPITAL RE, LTD.
business: Greenlight Capital Re, Ltd. is a global specialty property and casualty (P&C) reinsurer headquartered in the Cayman Islands. Greenlight Re provides multi-line property and casualty reinsurance globally, while GRIL focuses mainly on specialty business. Since 2018, our Innovations business unit has supported innovative, technology-driven insurance partners, both in the form of seed capital and reinsurance capacity.

exposures.sentence: We are a global specialty property and casualty (P&C) reinsurer headquartered in the Cayman Islands and listed on NASDAQ (ticker: GLRE).
Specialty: includes primarily agriculture, cyber, marine and energy, aviation and space, specialty multiline, and WPVT coverage.
Specialty: includes primarily agriculture, cyber, marine and energy, aviation and space, specialty multiline, and WPVT coverage.

Since 2018, our Innovations business unit has supported innovative, technology-driven insurance partners, both in the form of seed capital and reinsurance capacity.

catalysts.event: A.M. Best upgraded Financial Strength Rating to A (Excellent) for principal operating subsidiaries
catalysts.sentence: On November 13, 2025, A.M. Best upgraded our Financial Strength Rating to A (Excellent) and the Long-Term Issuer Credit Ratings of a (Excellent) for our principal operating subsidiaries and revised the outlook to stable from positive.

catalysts.event: Secured 22.5% third party capital to support Syndicate 3456 starting in 2026
catalysts.sentence: Starting in 2026, we have secured 22.5% of third party capital to support Syndicate 3456's projected business growth.

catalysts.event: Increased retrocession program for Innovations to 33% for 2026
catalysts.sentence: We have increased this retrocession program for 2026 to 33%.
